title: polystichum hirsutulum
intro: Polystichum hirsutulum, also known as the hairy-leafed lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Polystichum hirsutulum include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and reduce fever.
